titleStmt.title: SII 28.120: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 120. (A.R. No. 275 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra south wall.

Records an order (ōlai) issued by Villavarāyaṉ, apparently at the instance of the king addressed to a long list of officials connected with the administration of the temple, pertaining to the land granted as tirunāmattukkāṇi, for the maintenance of the several persons engaged in the service of the temple (pala-paṇi-nivandhakkārar) as also to the land in akkaṉ-paḷḷipaḍai alias Vikramachōḻa-nallūr, granted for garden to raise and supply flowers for adorning the god (Mudaliyār) and Goddess (Nāchchiyār) set up by Svāmi-dēvar. Probably some land in [Vītdi]ṉikkuḍi alias Gāṉa-vinōda-nallūr, a piḍāgai (hamlet) of this ūr had been purchased from Alachchaṉ Rudrarājaṉ Adabhra-sabhāpati alias Vikramapāṇḍyabrahmārāyaṉ.

In continuation there are five more lines which seem to be part of a different inscription. The beginning and continuation of the lines of this inscription are not also available. It states that a substitute land in Kōlam alias Chōḻakēraḷadēvanallūr, a hamlet of this ūr (Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr) was granted as tirunandavanappuṟa-iṟai-ili to be enjoyed as before (anubhōgappaḍi) granted in exchange for land already in enjoyment as tirunandavanattaṟai, as uḍal (capital) for the service (decoration of the deitytiru-muṉ-kāṭchchi) when the God was taken in procession.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī § śrīmaṟkirttikkumel koṟccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ sundrapāṇḍya(ya)tevarkku yāṇṭu 10 4vatu nāḷ nūṟṟu Irupattināliṉāl villavarāyaṉ Olai teṉṉavaṉ brahmārāyarum vikramacoḻa brahmarāyarum vikramapāṇḍyaya brahmārāyarum jayatuṅka pallavarayarum kurukulattarai
yarum Eṉātiyaraiyarum Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār koyil śrīmāheśvara kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum cāmutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyil nāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum tirumāḷikaik kūṟuceyvārkaḷum paṇṭārap pottakamuṭaiyārkaḷum kaṇakkarum ka
ṇṭu viṭu tantatāvatu mutaliyārkkum nācciyārkkum cātti Aruḷa tiruppūmaṇṭapattukku mutalākat tiruppaḷḷittāmam Aḷakkavum teṅku mā palā Uḷḷiṭṭa maraṅkaḷ Ākavum tevar cuvāmi tevar ceyvittaruḷiṉa perumpaṟṟappuliyūrakkaṉ paḷḷipaṭaiyāṉa vikramaśoḻa nallūril
pala varavai tirunāmattukkāṇiyāyp palapaṇi nimantakkārar jīvitamāyp potukiṟa nilattu vikramaśoḻaṉ tiruvitikku vaṭakku Aḷḷiyuṭaiyāṉ Āṟṟukku kiḻkarai nācciyār tirunantavaṉattukku kiḻakkut tirunilai Aḻakiyāṉ tirunantavaṉattellaikku merkkuk kaṇṇāṟṟu
kṣetramāka Iṉni vita Aṭaippu Uṭaiyārkaḷukku jīvitamaṭainta tirunāmattuk kāṇiyāṉa Ivvūrp piṭākai mītiṉikkuṭiyāṉa kāṉaviṉotanallūril Ālaccaṉ ruttarājaṉ (da)bhraśvabhāpatiyāṉa vikramapāṇḍyaya brahmārāyaṉ pakkal muṉṉāḷ vilaikoṇṭu viṭṭaruḷiṉa ma
The beginning of lines 6-10 is missing.ciṉamum Ikkaṇṇāṟṟu Iccatirattu nāvāvāṟṟukkut teṉkarai nilam kālum Ivvāṟṟukkuk kiḻakku ṉilam Āṟumāvum Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu
t tirunantavaṉattaṟaikku pratikṣetramākat tirukkaioṭṭi paṇṭārattuc cātaṉam Oṭukkit tirunāmattuk kāṇiyāka mutal koṇṭu jivitam
kkaṭalukku Eḻuntaruḷum potu Eḻuntaruḷippukkut tirukkaṇ cāttiyaruḷat tirumuṉkāṭccikku muṭalāka Ivvūrp piṭākai kolamāṉa coḻakeraḷatevanallūril
t tirunantavaṉappuṟa Iṟaiyiliyāka Aṉupokappaṭi mikutik kuṟaivu Uḷḷaṭaṅka viṭṭa Ūrppaṭi Oṭaikkut tekku kucaṉṉel ceyyeṉṟu peruṭaiya taṭi Iraṇ
ṉṟu peruṭaiya rūpāy Oṉpatu māvum Iṅku viṭṭu mukkāṟ kaṇṭam rūpāy Araiyum Iṅku viṭṭu keṉṟai cey Eḻumāvaraiyum Itaṉ vaṭakku viṭṭu cey taṭiContinuation lost.
Digital edition of SII 28.120 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
